description_long: This is a modern bungalow residence set within a landscaped plot featuring a swimming pool, tennis court, and various trees and shrubs. The main building has a flat roof, large glass windows, and a multi-level design with outdoor terraces and balconies. The property includes paved walkways, a driveway, and a small detached structure, possibly a garage or guest house. The exterior is finished with a mix of wood, concrete, and glass, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The surrounding garden is well-maintained, with a mix of deciduous and evergreen trees, and ornamental plants. The overall layout is open and spacious, emphasizing outdoor living and recreation.
description: A modern, multi-level bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, and extensive landscaped grounds including a pool and tennis court. The design features wood, concrete, and glass elements, surrounded by lush greenery.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entrance, pool, terraces, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court, driveway, and the rear of the bungalow with more trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tennis court, back facade, and grouped trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, side terraces, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
